treatment_information.specific_treatment: right foot debridement and right toe amputation
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Extensive debridement of the dorsal aspect of the foot; metatarsals spared with visible tendon.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Surgical procedure was performed, but further response details not provided.

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 15U Lantus and sliding scale as needed for glycemic control.
treatment_information.treatment_response: Initiated insulin treatment for DKA with no specific response detailed.
Response to antibiotic treatment not specified.
Response to pain management not specified.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with wet gangrene of right toes.
First right foot debridement and right toe amputation performed.
Second debridement and amputation of right toe performed.

patient_outcome.final_status: Mental status clear and coherent, level of consciousness alert and interactive.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Discharged to an extended care facility; follow-up not explicitly mentioned.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Ambulatory with assistance, requires walker or cane.
